name: Hungarian Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Use prune lekvar, a single layer filling, apricot preserves, or any other desired filling. Mix flour and oleo together to form pie dough. Beat egg yolks with sour cream until well combined. Pour the mixture into the flour mixture and blend with hands. Place on a flat plate covered with oiled paper (cut from a paper bag) and place in the refrigerator overnight. Roll out the dough into a square, cut squares, fill each with the desired filling, shape by folding opposite corners together, secure with a small amount of water, brush with egg yolk, and bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes until golden brown. Dust with powdered sugar after baking.
Oleo paper - Cut a paper bag into a sheet slightly larger than your plate. Oil the uncooked side of the wrapper and place it on top of the dough.
Shape like cookies by folding opposite corners together, securing with water, then brushing with egg yolk before baking.
